news.title: News & Medicine
news.subtitle: Stay updated with medical knowledge, institute activities, and the latest research from the Institute of Ethnic Medicine.
news.author: Institute of Ethnic Medicine

hero.title:
Preserving the Essence
of Vietnamese Traditional Medicine
hero.subtitle: With over 50 years of building and development, the Institute of Ethnic Medicine is proud to be the leading unit in the field of Traditional Medicine in Ho Chi Minh City, harmoniously combining the essence of national medicine with modern medicine.

sections.missionVisionSub: Institute development direction during national healthcare digital transformation
sections.missionDesc: Preserve, inherit, and promote the essence of Vietnamese Traditional Medicine. Provide comprehensive, safe, and effective healthcare services, contributing to improving community health.
missionItems: Training the next generation of Traditional Medicine practitioners
sections.visionDesc: Become a leading Traditional Medicine center in Southeast Asia, excellently combining national knowledge with modern medicine, applying digital technology in management and treatment.
visionItems: Leading in Traditional Medicine in the Southern region
sections.historySub: A journey of over 50 years of building and contributing to Vietnamese national medicine
sections.departmentsSub: Full department system serving diverse examination and treatment needs

ctaSection.title: Let Us Take Care of Your Health
ctaSection.subtitle: Book an appointment today to be consulted by our leading Traditional Medicine doctors.

milestones.title: Institute Established
milestones.desc: The Institute of Ethnic Medicine was established according to the Decision of HCMC People's Committee, under the Department of Health.

milestones.title: Specialty Expansion
milestones.desc: Added departments of Acupuncture, Physiotherapy - Rehabilitation, and Herbal Medicine.

milestones.title: Equipment Modernization
milestones.desc: Invested in X-Ray, Color Ultrasound, modern biochemical testing systems, enhancing diagnostic quality.

milestones.title: ISO 15189 Standard
milestones.desc: Laboratory achieved international ISO 15189 standard, affirming the quality of clinical services.

milestones.title: Digital Healthcare Transformation
milestones.desc: Deployed comprehensive HIS system, electronic medical records management and online booking.

milestones.title: Digital Healthcare Foundation
milestones.desc: Launched online booking portal integrated with VietQR payment, moving towards Healthcare 4.0 model.

departments.name: Examination - Emergency
departments.desc: Initial reception and processing of all patients.

departments.name: Acupuncture - Rehabilitation
departments.desc: Treatment by acupuncture, massage, spinal traction, and stroke rehabilitation.

departments.name: Traditional Medicine
departments.desc: Northern-Southern herbal formulas, folk remedies, traditional decoctions.

departments.name: Catgut Embedding - Procedures
departments.desc: Self-dissolving catgut embedding into acupoints, longer effect than regular acupuncture.

departments.name: Pharmacy - Herbal Medicine
departments.desc: Supply and certify standard herbal medicines, manufacture Traditional Medicine finished products.

departments.name: Clinical Laboratory
departments.desc: Blood tests, biochemistry, X-Ray, Color Ultrasound, Electrocardiogram.

departments.name: Nutrition
departments.desc: Clinical nutrition counseling combined with Traditional Medicine.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Our consultants are ready to support you 24/7. Send questions or book an appointment today.

lines: Phu Nhuan District, Ho Chi Minh City

note.title: Note:
note.text: Prices are for reference only and may change according to Ministry of Health regulations. For BHYT patients, the benefit level depends on the benefit code on the card and in-network/out-of-network status.

hero.title: Combining the essence of
hero.description: The leading reputable medical examination and treatment unit in the Southern region. We are committed to bringing peace of mind and optimal treatment effectiveness to every patient.

services.sectionDescription: We provide advanced treatment methods that combine the advantages of Traditional Medicine and modern technology.

items.title: Acupuncture - Rehabilitation
items.description: Effective treatment of sciatica, spinal degeneration, and post-stroke functional recovery.

items.title: General Examination
items.description: Comprehensive health assessment with the support of modern diagnostic equipment.

items.title: Traditional Medicine Herbs
items.description: Use of Northern-Southern herbal formulas with clear origins, meeting high-quality standards.

items.title: Physiotherapy
items.description: Exercise therapy, spinal traction, ultrasound therapy to help recover musculoskeletal function.

items.title: Clinical Laboratory
items.description: Biochemistry, hematology, X-Ray, Color Ultrasound testing systems that are accurate and fast.

items.title: Catgut Embedding Therapy
items.description: A breakthrough method applying self-dissolving catgut into acupoints, providing long-lasting treatment effects.

portfolio.sectionDescription: A green, tranquil treatment environment with a strong imprint of Traditional Medicine.

items.title: Famous Physician Memorial Garden
items.description: A campus preserving the essence of traditional Vietnamese medicine

Ready to take care of
your health
